name: Stuffed Artichokes
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound each artichoke by its stalk and leaves down on a drainboard until the leaves open; rinse well.
2. Cut off the bottom stems of flat artichokes so they can stand upright.
3. Trim the tips of the leaves about 1/2 inch with scissors.
4. Soak the artichokes in cold water.
5. Mix together bread crumbs, grated cheese, garlic, and lemon juice; a small amount of olive oil may be added to hold the mixture.
6. Starting at the bottom row of leaves, pull each leaf open with one hand and fill it with the stuffing using the other hand.
7. Draw the leaves as closely together as possible.
8. Stand the artichokes upright in a deep pot, wedged together so they won't fall over.
9. Drizzle a little olive oil over each artichoke.
10. Add about 2 inches of water to the pot; cover and steam the artichokes until done (cooking time varies depending on size and firmness). Check after 30 minutes; if the leaf pulls easily, the artichokes are ready.
